# local

## Plugin reference

- Description: Config UI for local backup target. Stores backup archives on the local filesystem.
- Contributes:
  - `ConfigV2.WebRegister`
- Server:
  - Uses: `backup.BackupTarget`, `config_v2.ConfigV2`, `config_v2.getConfig`
